channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari elected leader of BJP legislature party in West Bengal, to take oath as Chief Minister on May 9
item.description: In a historic development, senior BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari has been formally elected as the leader of the BJP legislature party in West Bengal. This paves the way for him to become the first BJP Ch...

item.title: B.C. Woman Blocked from Visiting Dying Brother Due to U.K. Passport Delays
item.description: A woman from British Columbia has been unable to travel to the United Kingdom to visit her critically ill brother because U.K. authorities have not expedited her passport request. Despite the urgency ...

item.title: Pauline Hanson cautious as One Nation targets first House of Reps seat in Farrer byelection
item.description: Ahead of Saturday’s Farrer federal byelection, Pauline Hanson has expressed caution despite growing optimism around One Nation candidate David Farley, who is poised for a potential breakthrough win in...

item.title: U.S. and Allied Forces Conduct Saber Strike Exercise in Poland
item.description: From April 27 to May 31, 2026, U.S. and Allied forces participated in Saber Strike at the Bemowo Piskie Training Area in Poland, a key exercise as part of NATO's Eastern Flank Deterrence Initiative. N...

item.title: Rule 8 Could Shake Up NBC Premier League Title Race Among Yanga, Simba, and Azam FC
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The NBC Premier League title race in Tanzania is heating up, as Rule 8 of the league regulations could change the standings significantly. Simba SC currently sit at second place with 4...

item.title: SGF Urges Correct Addressing of President Tinubu in Media
item.description: The Office of the Secretary to the Government of the Federation (OSGF) don raise alarm say some media houses and other organizations dey use wrong titles when dem dey refer to President Bola Ahmed Tin...

item.title: Impact of Internet Restrictions on Russian Small Businesses
item.description: Russian small businesses are increasingly struggling due to the Kremlin's tightening control over internet access, including restrictions on popular messaging apps such as Telegram and the intermitten...

item.title: NASA Discovers Resilient Fungi That Could Contaminate Mars and Other Celestial Bodies
item.description: NASA scientists have identified fungal strains that survive even the most rigorous sterilization procedures, raising concerns about the possibility that Earth microbes could already exist on Mars. Spa...

item.title: WWE United States Champion Tiffany Stratton Celebrates Title Win with Jet Ski Ride in Miami
item.description: WWE star Tiffany Stratton recently captured the Women's United States Championship by defeating Giulia on an episode of SmackDown. To celebrate her victory, Stratton took her new championship belt for...

item.title: Candace Cameron Bure to Become a Grandmother as Daughter Announces Pregnancy
item.description: Candace Cameron Bure, best known for playing D.J. Tanner on the popular sitcom “Full House” and its sequel “Fuller House,” is preparing to enter a new stage in her life: becoming a grandmother. The ne...

item.title: Senators raise concern over low conviction rate in gender-based violence cases
item.description: On Friday, Pakistani senators expressed deep concern over the rising trend of violence against women across the country. The discussion began when Balochistan Senator Naseema Ehsan highlighted the tra...

item.title: Trump Administration Publishes Declassified UFO Files Detailing Pilot Encounters
item.description: President Donald Trump, alongside Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, announced the release of declassified files concerning Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAPs), previously known as UFOs, with the aim...

item.title: Press Council of South Africa Advertises Part-Time Press Ombud Position
item.description: The Press Council of South Africa (PCSA) has readvertised the position of Press Ombud, a part-time senior independent role focused on upholding ethical journalism and resolving complaints against memb...

item.title: Tanzania pushes for psychosocial support to help communities recover from election violence
item.description: After the October 29 election wahala, many communities in Tanzania experienced deep trauma. People like Mohammed Issa, a bodaboda rider in Tunduma, saw their work and livelihoods affected when a natio...

item.title: CJI Recommends Young Law Graduates to Build Career at the Bar Instead of Direct Judicial Services
item.description: During a recent hearing at the Supreme Court, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant offered guidance to Prerna Gupta, a judicial services aspirant, whose plea for re-evaluation of her examination paper wa...

item.title: Constitutional Court declares Parliament's Phala Phala handling unconstitutional, orders fresh impeachment process
item.description: The Constitutional Court of South Africa has ruled that Parliament’s handling of the Phala Phala matter was unconstitutional and invalid. The court found that Rule 129I of the National Assembly is inc...

item.title: TMC MP Mahua Moitra raises complaint of harassment on IndiGo flight to Delhi
item.description: On May 8, 2026, Trinamool Congress MP Mahua Moitra publicly alleged that she experienced harassment during an IndiGo flight to Delhi. According to her statement, a group of passengers onboard behaved ...

item.title: Tanzanian Women Golfers Compete at Kenya Ladies Amateur Strokeplay 2026
item.description: Five Tanzanian female golfers, namely Madina Idd, Neema Olomi, Aalaa Somji, Vicky Elias and Jazila Daniel, have arrived in Kenya to compete in the Kenya Ladies Amateur Strokeplay Championship 2026 at ...

item.title: Atiku Calls for Transparent Review of NNPC Refinery Deal with Chinese Firms
item.description: Former Vice-President Atiku Abubakar don raise alarm over the recent partnership wey Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPC Ltd) enter with two Chinese companies, Sanjiang Chemical Company ...

item.title: Early Local Election Results Reveal Gains for Reform UK and Losses for Labour
item.description: Early results from local elections across England indicate significant shifts in council control. Reform UK has emerged as the biggest winner so far, gaining hundreds of seats and taking control of th...
